Localization.Description: Attackers can perform reconnaissance of the system infrastructure to determine possible further actions

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} read one or more important secrets in engine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} requested information about available engines on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} requested information about available authentication methods on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} requested information about the security policy on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} requested information about the token with hash {object.hash.sha256} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} checked the rights of the token with hash {subject.process.parent.hash.sha256} for access to the directory with hash {object.hash.sha256} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} requested information about available secrets on host {event_src.host}
